name: list_instances
description: List all cloud compute instances, optionally filtered by status or region.

name: start_instance
description: Start a stopped cloud compute instance.

instance_id.description: The unique ID of the instance to start.

name: stop_instance
description: Stop a running cloud compute instance. Data on ephemeral storage may be lost.

instance_id.description: The unique ID of the instance to stop.

force.description: Force stop the instance without graceful shutdown. Default false.

name: list_security_groups
description: List all security groups and their firewall rules.

name: modify_security_group
description: Add or remove a firewall rule in a security group. Controls network access to instances.

group_id.description: The unique ID of the security group to modify.

cidr.description: CIDR block for the rule (e.g. '0.0.0.0/0' for all traffic, '10.0.0.0/8' for internal).

name: create_snapshot
description: Create a snapshot of an instance's disk for backup or cloning purposes.

instance_id.description: The unique ID of the instance to snapshot.

name.description: A descriptive name for the snapshot.

name: deploy_service
description: Deploy a service to a target instance or cluster. This changes the running application.

service_name.description: Name of the service to deploy.

instance_id.description: The target instance ID to deploy to.

image.description: Container image or artifact to deploy (e.g. 'myapp:v2.1').

env_vars.description: Environment variables to set for the service as key-value pairs.
